creator: dan@BSDpro.com
text:
The primary FTP site for xw will be changing soon. I have it's new name pointing to the current IP. It will be moving early next week provided the port is updated by then.

Fix: 

ftp.databits.net will remain the backup ftp site, however, please change the primary ftp site from ftp.gurubox.com to ftp.BSDpro.com

Thanks a lot!
